mapper.insert:
/* StandardDisplayCategoryConnectCommandRepository.insertConnectList */
INSERT INTO PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO ( STD_CTG_NO, DISP_CTG_NO, REP_CTG_YN, SITE_NO, DPML_NO, USE_YN, DEL_YN, SYS_REG_ID, SYS_REG_DTM, SYS_MOD_ID, SYS_MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{item.stdCtgNo}, #{item.dispCtgNo}, #{item.repCtgYn}, #{item.siteNo}, #{item.dpmlNo}, #{item.useYn}, 'N', #{item.sysRegId}, NOW(), #{item.sysModId}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (STD_CTG_NO, DISP_CTG_NO) DO UPDATE SET REP_CTG_YN = EXCLUDED.REP_CTG_YN, USE_YN = EXCLUDED.USE_YN, DEL_YN = 'N', SYS_MOD_ID = EXCLUDED.SYS_MOD_ID, SYS_MOD_DTM = NOW()
